# Tuteliq MCP Server

> MCP server for Tuteliq — AI-powered child safety tools for Claude, Cursor, and other AI assistants.

## What is this?
A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes all Tuteliq child safety API endpoints as tools. Enables AI assistants like Claude and Cursor to detect bullying, grooming, self-harm, and other harmful content during development sessions.

## Install
npm install -g @tuteliq/mcp

## Configuration
Add to your MCP client settings with your Tuteliq API key. The server exposes tools for all 20+ Tuteliq API endpoints including text analysis, conversation analysis, media analysis, batch processing, and more.

## Available Tools
- detect_unsafe — Scan text for harmful content
- detect_bullying — Detect bullying patterns
- detect_grooming — Analyze conversations for grooming
- detect_social_engineering — Detect manipulation tactics
- analyze_emotions — Emotional well-being analysis
- analyse_multi — Multi-endpoint fan-out
- verify_age — Age verification via document, biometric, or combined methods (Beta, Pro tier, 5 credits)
- verify_identity — Identity verification with document auth, face matching, and liveness detection (Beta, Business tier, 10 credits)
- And 15+ more covering all Tuteliq API endpoints

## Supported Languages
27 languages: English (stable), Spanish, Portuguese, Ukrainian, Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Finnish, German, French, Dutch, Polish, Italian, Turkish, Romanian, Greek, Czech, Hungarian, Bulgarian, Croatian, Slovak, Lithuanian, Latvian, Estonian, Slovenian, Maltese, Irish (beta). Auto-detected, no configuration needed.

## Links
- Website: https://tuteliq.ai
- Documentation: https://docs.tuteliq.ai
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@tuteliq/mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/Tuteliq/mcp
